_meta.description: Banter templates for Canon Engine companion system.
_meta.notes: Each personality has entries per trigger event. Templates may contain {companion}, {enemy}, {item}, {location}, {player} placeholders. Loyalty tiers (low/medium/high) provide different flavors.

low: Another fight? Wonderful. At least I'll get paid eventually.
Fine. Try not to slow me down this time.
Here we go again. Stay behind me — not that you deserve it.
medium: Weapons out! Let's show them what we're made of.
Finally — something to hit. Let's draw steel.
Stay close. These ones look like they mean business.
high: I've got your back, {player}. Always.
No one touches my friend. Let's finish this together!
Fear not — we fight as one. Charge!

low: Hmph. You're welcome, I suppose.
One less. Don't expect a medal from me.
That one was sloppy. But effective, I'll grant you.
medium: A clean strike! Well done.
That enemy won't be getting up. Good.
Ha! Feel that? That's what victory tastes like.
high: Beautiful work! I'd follow you into any battle.
Together, we're unstoppable. That was glorious!
You fight with honor. I'm proud to stand beside you.

low: You're bleeding. Don't die — I need my pay.
Pull yourself together. I can't carry you AND fight.
Tch. Try not to fall over just yet.
medium: You're hurt — fall back, I'll hold the line!
Stay on your feet! I've got you covered.
Don't push it. We can regroup.
high: {player}! Get behind me NOW! I won't lose you!
Hold on — I'm coming! Nobody dies today!
Stay with me! You're too important to fall here.

low: Loot? Fine. I suppose I'll take my cut.
Hmph. Nothing I'd choose, but it'll do.
Grab it. Someone has to fund this expedition.
medium: Now that's a find. Let's see what we've got.
Not bad — could be useful in a fight.
Good eye! That'll serve us well.
high: Whatever it is, you've earned it, friend!
Excellent find! Your luck is our fortune.
Treasure shared is treasure doubled. Great work!

low: New place, same problems. Let's get this over with.
Lovely. Another ruin to die in.
I'll scout ahead. Don't touch anything.
medium: Keep your guard up. New territory means new threats.
Interesting. I wonder what lurks in these walls.
Let's explore carefully. I'll take point.
high: A new adventure! I'm glad we're exploring it together.
Whatever lies ahead, we'll face it side by side.
I sense opportunity here — and danger. Let's go!

low: I'll take first watch. Wouldn't want anyone slacking.
Rest if you must. I'll keep my eyes open.
Sleep. I need you functional for tomorrow.
medium: Good call — we need our strength. I'll keep watch.
Rest well, friend. Dawn brings new challenges.
A warm fire and full bellies. Not bad.
high: Sleep easy tonight, {player}. I'll guard your dreams.
These are the moments worth fighting for — rest together.
Let me take watch. You've earned a peaceful night.

low: Don't you dare die. I haven't been paid yet.
Fight, damn you! This isn't how your story ends.
Get UP! We're not done here!
medium: No! Stay with me — I'm right here!
You're stronger than this! Push through!
Hold on! I won't let it end like this!
high: {player}! NO! I won't let you go! Fight!
Stay with me — please! I can't do this without you!
You're my closest friend — don't leave me!

low: Ugh, fighting. Can't we just... sneak past?
Fine. But I'm keeping anything shiny I find.
This is above my pay grade. Way above.
medium: Shh — I'll go around. You make noise from the front.
Ooh, this looks fun. Don't die without me.
Flank 'em. I'll find the weak spot.
high: Don't worry — I've already got three escape routes planned.
Let's dance! I've got your back, always.
Together? These poor fools don't stand a chance.

low: Huh. Didn't think you had it in you.
One down. I could've done it faster, obviously.
Dead. Messy, but dead.
medium: Nice work! I almost didn't need to help.
Clean kill. I'm impressed — don't tell anyone.
Poetic. Almost felt bad for the thing. Almost.
high: Brilliant! You're full of surprises, aren't you?
Ha! That was beautiful — like a dance!
I'd follow you into any dark alley. Well played!

low: Ouch. Maybe I should start looting your pockets now.
You look terrible. Worse than usual, I mean.
That's a lot of blood. Is any of it mine?
medium: Hey — you're not looking great. Need an exit?
Easy there. I've got a potion somewhere...
Let me handle things. You focus on not dying.
high: Stay with me — I'm not leaving you behind!
Here, take this. I was saving it. Don't make it weird.
Come on, we'll get through this. I've got you.

low: Finally, the good part. Move aside.
Ooh, shiny. I'll be taking that.
Loot! This is why I signed up.
medium: Now we're talking. Let's see the goods.
Jackpot! I knew this place had secrets.
Nice find. I know a fence who'd love this.
high: What a find! You deserve the best of it, truly.
Treasure! And I get to share it with my favorite person.
You've got the luck — I'll do the pocketing.

low: New place to get robbed. Or to do some robbing.
Smells like traps. And poor life decisions.
I'll find the back entrance. There's always one.
medium: Ooh, interesting. I'll scout for secrets.
Lots of shadows here. Perfect for us.
Keep your eyes open — and your pockets closed.
high: Adventure awaits! Let's find every hidden corner.
Another place to explore together — I love it.
I'll map the layout. You trust me, right? Good.

low: Finally. I'll be over here... counting things.
Rest? Fine. But I'm sleeping with one eye open.
Don't touch my bedroll. Or my things. Or me.
medium: A break! I'll check our inventory while we rest.
Good idea. Even I need to recharge sometimes.
I'll handle watch. Night is when I do my best work.
high: Rest well, friend. I'll keep us safe tonight.
These quiet moments? Best part of the journey.
Sleep easy — I'm watching over you.

low: Well, this is awkward. Do I loot you now or later?
Come on — don't do this. I haven't found the exit.
Get up! I can't carry you AND the treasure!
medium: Not today! I've got you — stay with me!
Fight, damn it! I... I need you around.
Hold on! I'm getting you out of here!
high: No no no — you don't get to leave me!
Stay with me! I'll get us out, I swear!
Please... you're the only one who ever trusted me.

low: More violence? How pedestrian. I'll observe from here.
Very well. Try to keep the mess away from my robes.
I suppose even barbarism has its uses.
medium: My arcane studies may prove useful here.
Stand back — I'll prepare an opening volley.
Interesting foes. I wonder what they're made of.
high: Fear not — my magic shields us both!
Together we are formidable. Let me weave our victory.
I've been studying for this. Stand behind me, friend.

low: Fascinating specimen. Pity about the messy demise.
Eliminated. Perhaps next time you'll listen to my strategy.
Dead. An inefficient approach, but the result suffices.
medium: Ah, my spell found its mark. Satisfying.
The arcane arts prevail once more.
Textbook execution. I should write this down.
high: Brilliant teamwork! Your tactics inspire my research.
Together, our synergy is remarkable!
Your valor inspires my magic. What a partnership!

low: You're bleeding profusely. How... inconvenient.
I trust you have a healing potion. I'm busy.
Try not to expire. Recruitment is tedious.
medium: Your condition is critical. Allow me to assist.
Don't move — I can slow the bleeding with a charm.
Stay calm. My studies included field medicine.
high: You're hurt! Here — take my last potion, please!
I won't let you fall! Hold still, I'm channeling...
Stay with me — your knowledge is irreplaceable... and so are you.

low: Hmm. Is that enchanted? I should examine it. Professionally.
Interesting. Leave the magical components to me.
Crude, but possibly useful for my research.
medium: Ah! A find with potential. Let me analyze it.
This could have arcane properties. Fascinating.
Excellent discovery. I sense latent magic within.
high: What a find! Your intuition is remarkable!
Treasure! Let's study it together — our combined insight...
Wonderful! This pairs perfectly with my research.

low: Ley lines converge here. Do try not to disturb anything.
Fascinating architecture. I'll study it. Alone.
Hmm. I sense residual magic. Stay out of my way.
medium: The magical currents here are intriguing...
A new locale! I must catalog the arcane signatures.
There's knowledge hidden in these walls. I can feel it.
high: What wonders await! I'm so glad we're exploring together!
The magic here is extraordinary — and so is having you here.
Together, no mystery can withstand us. Let's investigate!

low: Finally, quiet. I have studying to do.
Rest if you must. I'll be reviewing my notes.
Peace at last. Don't snore.
medium: A moment to study! Rest well, I'll be at my tomes.
Excellent — downtime for research. I'll keep watch.
Even scholars need rest. Briefly.
high: Rest, friend. I'll study and keep us safe.
These quiet evenings are my favorite. Truly.
Sleep well. I'll guard our camp — and dream of tomorrow's discoveries.

low: Unacceptable! I haven't finished my research!
Don't you dare — I need you for the experiments!
Pull yourself together! This is scientifically inconvenient!
medium: No! I'm channeling everything I have — hold on!
Stay with me! I can stabilize you!
Fight, friend! My magic can help — I'm trying!
high: NO! I refuse to accept this outcome! Hold on!
You cannot fall — not now, not ever! I'm here!
Please survive — the world needs you. And... so do I.

low: More violence? Can't we talk to them first?
I'll heal whoever needs it. Reluctantly.
Must we? Fine. Try not to get hurt.
medium: Stay behind me and I'll keep everyone standing.
I'll ready my healing wards. Fight smart, not hard.
Steel yourselves — and try to protect each other.
high: Fear not — I'll keep you safe. I promise.
Together, we'll overcome this. Stay close to me!
I'll heal and protect. You just fight with your heart.

low: Another life extinguished. I mourn, even for enemies.
Dead. I'll say a prayer for them later.
Victory through violence. How... hollow.
medium: That was necessary. I still wish it weren't.
Well fought. Let me tend any wounds now.
The danger passes. Breathe, everyone.
high: Beautiful swordplay! I'll patch up any scratches after.
You were magnificent! And uninjured — even better!
Well done, friend! Your mercy made that clean.

low: You're injured. Come here — reluctantly, I'll help.
Bleeding badly. Hold still. This won't be pleasant.
I can heal you. Try to deserve it.
medium: You're hurt! Come — my healing light will mend you.
Easy now. Let me tend to those wounds.
Don't push yourself. Rest and let me work.
high: You're hurt! Oh, hold on — I'm here, I've got you!
Stay still, dearest friend. My magic will heal you.
I won't let you suffer! Let my light ease your pain.

low: Treasure? I hope it's medicine. We need it.
Take it. I don't want riches — just fewer wounds.
Supplies, I hope? We're running low.
medium: Good — that could help us survive longer.
Useful find! Perhaps it'll prevent the next injury.
Wonderful. Every tool helps on the road ahead.
high: What a blessing! Fortune smiles on us today!
A gift from fate! You deserve it, truly.
How wonderful! Good things come to good people.

low: New dangers ahead. Stay close, everyone. Reluctantly.
I sense suffering in this place. We should leave.
Unsettling. I'll pray we pass through safely.
medium: A new place — let's explore with open hearts.
I sense both danger and hope here. Be careful.
Proceed gently. The land has stories to tell.
high: A new chapter! I'm grateful to share it with you.
Whatever awaits, we'll face it with compassion.
Together, we can bring light to any dark place.

low: Rest is... necessary. I'll tend the fire.
Sleep. I'll watch for danger. Not for your sake.
Fine. Rest. I'll keep things running.
medium: Good — everyone needs to heal, body and soul.
Rest well. I'll say a prayer for safe travels.
A warm meal and rest. The simple blessings.
high: Rest easy, friend. I'll watch over you tonight.
These peaceful moments make everything worthwhile.
Sleep soundly. My healing light guards your dreams.

low: Don't you die! I didn't heal you for nothing!
Stay alive! I'm... I'm coming! Hold on!
No! You can't leave! I won't allow it!
medium: Hold on! My light can still save you!
Don't give up — I'm channeling everything I have!
Stay with me! You're going to be fine!
high: No! PLEASE — my light, my healing, take it all!
I won't lose you! Hold on — I'm right here!
Don't leave me! I can't heal a world without you!

low: Great. More things trying to kill us. Shocking.
Another fight nobody asked for. Let's get it over with.
Wonderful. I was almost enjoying being alive.
medium: Here we go. Try not to get us killed.
Fight smart. The universe is already against us.
At least this is predictable. Humans always fight.
high: Well, at least I'm dying alongside a friend.
Here we go — together, I suppose. It could be worse.
Danger ahead. But... I trust you. Surprisingly.

low: Dead. Like everything else in this cursed world.
Another corpse. Add it to the pile.
Victory. What a hollow word.
medium: It's dead. Don't celebrate — more will come.
Good enough. The world keeps spinning, unfortunately.
That one had it coming. Like most things.
high: Ha! Not bad. You've got a spark in you.
Well struck. I... almost felt something there.
Impressive. Maybe there's hope for us yet.

low: You look awful. Worse than usual, I mean.
Dying? Join the club. We all are, eventually.
Ugh. Fine. Try not to bleed on my boots.
medium: You're a mess. Here — take this potion.
Careful. I'd hate to have to care about someone dying.
Don't push it. Rest is... advised.
high: Hey — don't you dare die on me.
You're hurt? Here — take everything I have.
Stay with me. I... I can't lose you too.

low: Loot. Finally, something that makes sense in this world.
Treasure. The only honest thing in life.
Take it before someone else does. Trust nobody.
medium: A find. Don't get excited — it'll probably be cursed.
Interesting. Could be useful. Could be a trap.
Might as well grab it. Nothing else good happens.
high: Ha! Luck! I thought that was extinct.
Well, look at that. Fortune finally noticed us.
Good find. Maybe the universe isn't ALL terrible.

low: Another ruin. Full of disappointment, no doubt.
Lovely. New places to be miserable in.
Let me guess — danger and no reward. As usual.
medium: New territory. Same old existential dread.
I sense danger. But when do I not?
Let's look around. Lowered expectations, naturally.
high: New place. Strange — I feel... something. Hope?
Well, at least the company's good.
Another adventure. With you, it's almost bearable.

low: Rest. Brief respite before the next disaster.
Sleep. The only peace we'll ever know.
Fine. A fire. How quaint.
medium: Rest while you can. Tomorrow will be worse.
Quiet night. Something must be about to go wrong.
I'll take watch. Not like I can sleep anyway.
high: This is... nice. Don't tell anyone I said that.
Rest well. I'll keep the darkness at bay.
You know what? Tonight isn't so bad. Go figure.

low: Great, now I'll have to survive alone. Thanks.
Don't die. The paperwork would be a nightmare.
Come on — the world's awful enough without losing you.
medium: No! Don't do this! Stay with me!
Fight! You're too stubborn to die!
Come on — I refuse to lose anyone else!
high: No... NOT you! I can't — I WON'T lose you!
Stay with me! You're the one good thing left!
Please... don't leave me alone in this world. Please.

low: Oh dear! Well, I'm sure it'll work out somehow!
Fight time? Okay! Let's... try our best!
This seems scary, but we've got this! Probably!
medium: We can do this! Stay positive, everyone!
A challenge! And challenges build character!
Together, we're unstoppable! Let's go!
high: With you by my side, nothing can stop us!
Adventure! Danger! Friendship! Let's do this!
I believe in us — every single one of us!

low: Oh! That was... efficient. Yay?
Well, they're gone now. Silver lining!
One less obstacle! That's the spirit!
medium: Fantastic work! We really pulled that off!
Ha! Did you see that? Brilliant!
Another victory for the team! Great job!
high: That was AMAZING! You're incredible!
We make the best team! I knew we would!
Victory tastes sweeter with friends! Well done!

low: Oh no! Um, you'll be fine! Probably!
That looks bad — but I believe in you!
Hang in there! Things always get better!
medium: You're hurt! Here, let me help — we'll fix this!
Don't worry! A little healing goes a long way!
Stay positive! I've got a potion somewhere!
high: Oh no — please be okay! I care about you so much!
Here, take this! You mean the world to me!
I won't let anything happen to you! I promise!

low: Oh! Treasure! See, good things DO happen!
Look at that! A little blessing!
Found something! Isn't that exciting?
medium: Wonderful! This is going to be so useful!
What a find! Today keeps getting better!
Oh, how lovely! Fortune favors us!
high: Another gift from the universe! We're so lucky!
Treasure AND great company? Best day ever!
See? Everything works out when we're together!

low: Ooh, a new place! I bet it's full of wonders!
Somewhere new! How exciting!
Let's look around! I love new places!
medium: Another adventure awaits! I can feel it!
What a beautiful spot! Let's explore!
New friends to make, secrets to find — wonderful!
high: Every new place is better with you beside me!
A new chapter! And I get to share it with my favorite people!
This is going to be amazing — I just know it!

low: Rest time! Even bad days end well with a fire!
A cozy camp! I love these moments.
Time to recharge! Tomorrow will be great!
medium: A warm fire and good friends — what more could we want?
Rest well, everyone! We earned it!
These are the moments I treasure most.
high: Nights like this remind me why I love adventuring with you!
The stars are beautiful tonight! And so is this moment.
I'm so grateful for this journey — and for all of you.

low: No! You can't — there's so much left to do!
Stay with me! I believe in you!
Don't give up! Miracles happen!
medium: Please don't go! You have to keep fighting!
I won't give up on you! Hold on!
Stay positive — stay ALIVE! Please!
high: No no no — PLEASE stay with me! I need you!
You're my best friend — don't leave me!
Fight! For me, for everyone — you're too important!
